from datetime import datetime

LOG_FMT = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"


def _parse_ts(raw):
    return datetime.strptime(raw, LOG_FMT)


def parse_log_entry(line):
    parts = line.split(" | ")
    return {"timestamp": _parse_ts(parts[0]), "message": parts[1]}


def parse_access_log(line):
    fields = line.split(",")
    return {"timestamp": _parse_ts(fields[0]), "ip": fields[1], "path": fields[2]}


def parse_audit_record(line):
    segments = line.split(";")
    return {"timestamp": _parse_ts(segments[0]), "user": segments[1], "action": segments[2]}
